domain: Tibetan sand mandala Buddhist tradition: created over days from colored sand; 4-stage ritual outline → colored-sand fill → consecration → dissolution; dissolution sweeps from edges spiral-inward to center forming pile then cast to flowing water; deity syllables removed first in specific reverse-creation order before geometry; impermanence doctrine (Anicca) + non-attachment teaching; sand becomes one-with-water reintegration cycle
specific_mechanism: MANDALA-4-FOLD-DEITY-FIRST-DISSOLUTION-BASIN-RESET: 4-stage basin-stability training-cycle with (1) 4-stage cycle (outline → fill → consecrate → dissolve) every K_cycle training steps: model proceeds through 4 named stages then partially dissolved/reset to mitigate basin-overfitting; (2) deity-syllable-first dissolution-order: when dissolving, parameters reset in specific order — high-level 'deity' (output head, top-layer) first, then 'geometry' (mid-layer), then 'sand' (bottom-layer embeddings) — preserving foundational structure while resetting fine-grained specialization; (3) center-spiral sweep R_spiral: dissolution spirals inward from layer-edges to layer-center; equivalent to regularization λ·||θ - θ_center||² pulling parameters toward center anchor; (4) water-reintegration cycle: dissolved parameters pooled and re-distributed across model layers (mixing) before next cycle begins — sand-to-water analog; (5) non-attachment regularizer L_noatt: at each cycle end, regularizer discouraging over-attachment to current basin minimum, favoring larger basin radii. Differs from R510 BOZUY-KEREGE-UUK-TUNDUK-BASIN (4-component kerege+uuk+tunduk+koshma yurt structural decomposition + interlaced rank-1 LoRA + central anchor + felt smoothing, no 4-fold ritual cycle + no deity-first dissolution + no center-spiral sweep + no water-reintegration + no non-attachment) and R523 MARAMURES-BLOCKBAU-DOVETAIL (dovetail pair-wise + no-norm + Blockbau row-lock + slim spine + shingle-roof, no 4-fold cycle + no deity-first + no water-reintegration) by 4-fold ritual training cycle + deity-first top-to-bottom dissolution order + center-spiral inward sweep regularization + water-reintegration mixing pool + non-attachment regularizer.
llm_application: MANDALA-4-FOLD-DEITY-FIRST-DISSOLUTION-BASIN-RESET 4-stage basin-stability cycle outline-fill-consecrate-dissolve every K_cycle steps + deity-syllable-first dissolution top-to-bottom reset order output-head before mid-layer before embeddings + center-spiral sweep R_spiral inward layer-edges to layer-center anchor regularization + water-reintegration dissolved-parameter pool re-distribute mixing + non-attachment regularizer L_noatt larger-basin favoring. Differs from R404. R420. R434. R450. R460. R471. R485. R498. R510 BOZUY-KEREGE-UUK-TUNDUK-BASIN (closest — 4-component yurt + central anchor + felt smoothing). R523 MARAMURES-BLOCKBAU-DOVETAIL (closest — dovetail + no-norm + Blockbau row-lock). Differs from Basin-Like Loss 2505.17646 + Spike No More + Methods Stability 2410.16682 + Scaling with Collapse 2509.25087 by 4-fold + deity-first + center-spiral + water-reintegration + non-attachment. Differs by 4-FOLD RITUAL CYCLE + DEITY-FIRST TOP-TO-BOTTOM DISSOLUTION ORDER + CENTER-SPIRAL INWARD SWEEP REGULARIZATION + WATER-REINTEGRATION MIXING POOL + NON-ATTACHMENT REGULARIZER.
novelty_claim: Basin-Like Loss Landscape 2505.17646 + Spike No More SPAM + Methods LLM Training Stability 2410.16682 + Scaling with Collapse 2509.25087 cover basin-loss-landscape + spike-stability + training-collapse paradigm. MANDALA-4-FOLD-DEITY-FIRST-DISSOLUTION-BASIN-RESET adds (a) 4-fold training cycle outline-fill-consecrate-dissolve + (b) deity-first top-to-bottom layered reset order + (c) center-spiral inward sweep regularization + (d) water-reintegration mixing pool + (e) non-attachment regularizer larger-basin favoring. Recombination — borderline lookup.
